items.title: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (UNH) Shareholders Push for Independent Board Chair
items.description: UnitedHealth Group Inc. (NYSE:UNH) is one of the best stocks in Michael Burry’s stock portfolio. On October 3, the company’s shareholders proposed the adoption of an independent board chair. The position is currently held by Stephen Hemsley, Chief Executive Officer. While Hemsley has served as board chair since 2017, he assumed the role of CEO in […]

items.title: CVS' Aetna Wins Big on 2026 MA Star Ratings: How to Play the Stock?
items.description: CVS' Aetna shines in 2026 Medicare Star Ratings, with more than 81% of members in four-star plans, fueling a 73.5% YTD stock surge and strong investor momentum.
